scripts.typecheck: vue-tsc --noEmit -p apps/desktop/tsconfig.web.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/desktop/tsconfig.node.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/contracts/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/domain/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/application/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/infrastructure-sqlite/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/pi-runtime-adapter/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/chat-ui-adapter/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/tool-sdk/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/scheduler/tsconfig.json
scripts.verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test
